title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at India Ratings

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at India Ratings
jsonLd.description:
India Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Nashik. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About India Ratings:
India Ratings is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with India Ratings!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
